li.xpath: Defs/ThingDef[defName="Plant_Agave" or defName="Plantbean" or defName="PlantTomato" or defName="Plant_Mushroom" or defName="Plant_Devilstrand" or defName="PepperPlant" or defName="Plant_Psychoid" or defName="Plant_Watermelon" or defName="Plant_Cotton" or defName="Plant_Sugarcane" or defName="Plant_PricklyPear" or defName="Plant_HealrootWild" or defName="Plant_TreeBanana"]/plant
